description: Style Note Created for today's generation, this spinn Agile shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetics. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love!Product DetailsRound toed casual shoe in black, grey and red with lace-up fastening with thick, wax-coated laces for slip free knotting, and pull tabSynthetic suede upper with PU overlaysEVA padded midsoleRubber outsole with patterned groovesMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
